channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation
item.description: The de-extinction startup is looking to double or triple its previous valuation, according to the report.

item.title: Amazon's Adaptive Display for Fire TVs is officially rolling out today
item.description: Amazon's Adaptive Display accessibility feature for Fire TVs is officially rolling out today

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, July 21 (game #1136)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, July 21 (game #1639)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, July 21 (game #870)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: macOS 27 Beta has a secret Siri AI interface. How to try it.
item.description: There's a secret Siri AI interface in the new macOS beta. Here's how to turn it on.

item.title: Xpeng claims China is close to making a Tesla Model Y beater — but my experience suggests it'll fall short for two big reasons
item.description: Can Xpeng really beat the Tesla Model Y? After driving both, I have doubts

item.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
item.description: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

item.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
item.description: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

item.title: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
item.description: Last October, we told you how the FCC had given itself the power to retroactively ban gadgets that have already received its approval to be imported and sold in the United States. Now, the FCC's getting ready to wield that power for the first time, by cracking down on the "DJI front companies" suspected of […]

item.title: AI just disproved a major math problem. A mathematician explains.
item.description: A Harvard mathematician says he used Anthropic's Fable 5 to disprove a major open math problem. How impressed should we be?

item.title: Quote of the day by Alan Turing: 'We can only see a short distance ahead, but we can see plenty there that needs to be done' — key guidance on the road to building AI
item.description: The legendary computer scientist outlined the foundations for many of the technologies we use today
